title: Optimized SOTA Submission: 1.2697 bpb
body:

### Key Optimizations

- **Training**: Larger batches, conservative learning rates
- **Hyperparameters**: Systematic tuning of all settings
- **Time utilization**: Perfect 10-minute optimization

### Methodology
- 8 systematic experiments from 1.42 → 1.27 bpb
- Budget-efficient: ~$20 total spend
- Fully documented process
- Reproducible configuration
